entries.value: Skinning knife with worn antler grip
Oiled wool travel-cloak, smells of woodsmoke
Satchel: tinder, 3 iron rations, Veiled Mother charm
Short bow + half-quiver of bog-iron arrows
Purse with 1d6 silver + an unreadable note
Waterskin half-full of weak Eldfield ale
Worn travel boots, slightly too large
Small whetstone in a leather pouch
